html:
Exclusive to:

The Shadow Atrium Tendril is a plant that grows from WX-78's Backup Chassis. With the Shadow Servitor skill, WX-78 can implant either a Shadow Atrium or a Possessed Shadow Atrium into its Backup Chassis.

After implantation, if there are fewer than 4 Shadow Atrium Tendrils within a 6-wall-unit radius of the Backup Chassis, a new Tendril will spawn every 2 to 2.5 minutes within that radius. They cannot spawn within 2 units of other objects.

WX-78 Backup Chassis with Shadow Atrium Tendril.

A Shadow Atrium Tendril can be chopped with an Axe to obtain 1 loot item, which varies depending on the biome. Its possible drops are the same as those from Boulderbough.

When the Backup Chassis is destroyed, or when WX-78 transfers its consciousness to it, all Shadow Atrium Tendrils associated with that Chassis will disappear and drop their loot.

Trivia

  • The Shadow Atrium Tendril is added in WX-78 Skill Spotlight update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"shadow_heart_vein"
“A vein attempt to be useful.”
–Wilson
“Disgusting! I don't care what it's got!”
–Willow
“Haha! Not as mighty as Wolfgang biceps vein!”
–Wolfgang
“From a heart that knows no peace.”
–Wendy
“GROSS. BUT ACCEPTABLE LEVELS OF USEFULNESS”
–WX-78
“This is dark magic indeed.”
–Wickerbottom
“Don't worry, Luce. I won't let it grab you.”
–Woodie
“And yet it offers gifts from below.”
–Maxwell
“Such gifts bear ill förtune.”
–Wigfrid
“We don't like being around that.”
–Webber
“It has roots and grows in the dirt, but that is no vegetable.”
–Warly
“Cold friend gift?”
–Wormwood
“It was creepin' and crawlin' underground.”
–Winona
“And even there, it's a snare!”
–Wortox
“Thanks, sad heart.”
–Wurt
“Aw, it's so helpful!”
–Walter
“It's growing...”
–Wanda
The Shadow Atrium Tendril is a plant that grows from WX-78's Backup Chassis. With the Shadow Servitor skill, WX-78 can implant either a Shadow Atrium or a Possessed Shadow Atrium into its Backup Chassis.
After implantation, if there are fewer than 4 Shadow Atrium Tendrils within a 6-wall-unit radius of the Backup Chassis, a new Tendril will spawn every 2 to 2.5 minutes within that radius. They cannot spawn within 2 units of other objects.
WX-78 Backup Chassis with Shadow Atrium Tendril.
A Shadow Atrium Tendril can be chopped with an Axe to obtain 1 loot item, which varies depending on the biome. Its possible drops are the same as those from Boulderbough.
When the Backup Chassis is destroyed, or when WX-78 transfers its consciousness to it, all Shadow Atrium Tendrils associated with that Chassis will disappear and drop their loot.

The '''Shadow Atrium Tendril''' is a plant that grows from WX-78's [[Backup Chassis]]. With the [[Shadow Servitor]] skill, WX-78 can implant either a [[Shadow Atrium]] or a [[Possessed Shadow Atrium]] into its Backup Chassis.

After implantation, if there are fewer than 4 Shadow Atrium Tendrils within a 6-wall-unit radius of the Backup Chassis, a new Tendril will spawn every 2 to 2.5 minutes within that radius. They cannot spawn within 2 units of other objects.
[[File:WX-78 Backup Chassis with Shadow Atrium Tendril.png|200px|thumb|left|WX-78 Backup Chassis with Shadow Atrium Tendril.]]
A Shadow Atrium Tendril can be chopped with an [[Axe]] to obtain 1 loot item, which varies depending on the biome. Its possible drops are the same as those from [[Boulderbough#Drops|Boulderbough]].

When the Backup Chassis is destroyed, or when WX-78 transfers its consciousness to it, all Shadow Atrium Tendrils associated with that Chassis will disappear and drop their loot.
{{clear}}
== {{Trivia}} Trivia ==
* The Shadow Atrium Tendril is added in ''[[WX-78 Skill Spotlight]]'' update.
